sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40172" key="e)pimempte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμεμπτ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n40172.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must condemn</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
